transcript.clean_text: after six five star stages at the tour de france they moved to day seven the longest stage of the tour de france in over two decades beginning in vienzo heading to le crosses venue for two time trials in the past this time a road stage after 249.1 kilometers points available again in the king of the mountains competition had been on hold in the last few days the racing though not so much a hot day and a little bit of headwind towards the start didn't deter the attacks it took a long time to peter out but eventually a group of 29 riders would get up the road including the yellow jersey yes the leader of the tour de france in the break today pogaccha having a chase uae emirates missing out with vincenzo nibili and watforn art also very dangerous in the general classification mark cavendish made it into the breakaway and he'd pick up 20 points in the green jersey classification extended his lead to 66 over his nearest competitor a very good day in the break for mark cavendish inside the final 85 kilometers the race would change after a flattish start the climbs came thick and fast maharich and von moore attacked the slovenian champion there for bahrain victorious victor cabanas and jasper sturvin counter attacking with just under 50 kilometers to go they look good after making a cross quick patrick conrad though despite showing strong legs we've been able to get to the front under the signal duchamp the hardest climb so far in the tour de france making its debut in the race mate mohawk chose that as the moment to leave behind the competitors back in the main group of favorites richard carapaz would attack primos roglic would lose contact and will be on his way to losing quite a bit of time fanart and vanderpool wanting to try and affect the race but at this stage inside the last eight case it was clear that they weren't going to catch the leader on the day this was about the general classification the emotion clear on the face of mate moharich already a stage winner at the journal in the welter now a stage winner at the tour de france and on a very special day indeed disaster in the first few days with hay crashing out redemption for bahrain and a win for maharat second place went to the brilliant jasper stervant and behind even thunder pool would sprint for bonus seconds court would take those thunder pool though would keep the yellow jersey for yet another day for not moving up into second place karapas had looked like he's taken some time but chasing him down movie star team making sure he'd gain absolutely nothing former youth world champion mahrich produced a performance that would have been loved around the world maher stervin caught with fonder pool and ascreen making up the top five nearly took time back to in the general classification but prima roglic would lose well over three minutes to his immediate rivals suffering from injuries and coming across the line without a teammate in sight questions to be answered for jumbo visma a resounding answer always given by machiavonipol and he still leads the tour de france 30 seconds his lead over walt fernat ice queen maharish pogachar in the top five pogata at 343 but it's the difference between him and his fellow rivals that everybody will be looking at as the riders head into the alps good memories for julian alaphilippe returning to the scene of a previous victory le grumborno 150 kilometers and are opening first category climbs of the tour de france with bonus seconds available at the top of the caldera colombia uae emirates already forced to work harder than they would have ever imagined tomorrow stage eight will be another big day for that the tour de france is wide open the race is on and there's still quite a way to go to paris
